evidently.feature.variationobject.Boolea.Docs: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is boolean.

evidently.feature.variationobject.Double.Docs: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is a double.

evidently.feature.variationobject.LongVa.Docs: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is a long.

evidently.feature.variationobject.String.Docs: The value assigned to this variation, if the variation type is a string.

evidently.feature.variationobject.Variat.Docs: A name for the variation. It can include up to 127 characters.
